spec.description:
A complete Grafana dashboard for monitoring Frigate with Prometheus metrics.
Covers Python runtime GC stats, CPU & memory usage, camera FPS and detection performance, storage utilization, and service health.
Works with Frigate’s built-in /api/metrics endpoint. Designed with modern visualizations, thresholds, and alerts.

spec.title: GC Objects Collected per Second (by Generation)
spec.description:
Shows the number of Python objects collected by the Garbage Collector per second, broken down by generation (0, 1, 2).
Generation 0 = short-lived objects, Generation 2 = long-lived objects.
High activity in Gen0 is normal. Frequent activity in Gen2 may indicate heavy memory usage.

spec.title: Frigate Total CPU Usage
spec.description: Overall CPU usage of the Frigate process

spec.title: CPU Usage per Process
spec.description: Breakdown of CPU consumption per camera process (ffmpeg, detect, capture, recording, etc.)

spec.title: Memory Usage per Process
spec.description: Memory usage split by Frigate sub-processes.

spec.title: Proccessed FPS
spec.description: Frames per second actually processed by Frigate.

spec.title: Detection FPS
spec.description: How often object detection runs per camera.

spec.title: Detector Inference Speed
spec.description: Average inference time per object detection run.

spec.title: GC Collections per Minute (by Generation)
spec.description:
Shows how often the GC is triggered per minute for each generation.
High values in Gen0 are expected. Frequent collections in Gen1/Gen2 can suggest memory fragmentation or high workload in the Python runtime

spec.title: Recording Storage Usage (%)
spec.description: How full the recordings storage is.

spec.title: Frigate Version Info
spec.description: Shows current Frigate version and latest available version.

spec.title: Uncollectable Objects (last 1h)
spec.description:
Displays the number of Python objects that could not be collected by the GC in the last hour.
Any non-zero value indicates potential memory leaks, where objects remain referenced and cannot be freed.

spec.title: Total Objects Collected/sec
spec.description:
Aggregates all collected objects across all generations per second.
Provides a high-level view of Python GC activity. Sudden spikes can mean bursts of object allocation in Frigate’s runtime.

spec.title: Frigate
